home.heroSubtitle: Engineered for Graduated Compression. Enhanced Recovery. Everyday Comfort.
home.heroBody: Trusted by medical professionals and individuals across India and Vietnam. Vista Care Compression Garments are designed to promote better circulation, reduce swelling, and accelerate healing.
home.aboutSnippet: We at Vistaar International CG Co. Ltd are manufactures of Vista Care Brand of Compression Garments. We have more than Two decades of experience in manufacture medical-grade (Class I & II) stockings and sleeves designed to support blood circulation, reduce swelling, and accelerate recovery from a wide range of venous disorders and lymphatic conditions.
home.whyChooseIntro: At Vista Care, we go beyond generic solutions. Our compression garments are optimal sized for all age groups to match your specific medical preventive needs.
home.productRangeIntro: We manufacture Class I & Class II compression garments in multiple ranges:
home.productsShowcaseIntro: Medical-grade support for every need — from daily wear to post-surgical recovery.
home.testimonialsIntro: What doctors, clinics, and everyday wearers say about Vista Care.
home.videoTitle: Experience the Power of Medical Compression

about.heroTitle: More than Two decades of Experience in Healing Through Compression Garments
about.heroBody: At Vista Care, we don't just manufacture compression garments — we deliver therapeutic solutions backed by two decades of clinical insight and compassionate care, to enhance recovery, prevent complications, and improve quality of life through precise, medical-grade compression garments designed for real comfort and quick healing.
about.whatWeDoOutro: Each garment is developed using specially engineered cotton-rich, breathable, and skin-safe fabric optimized to match individual medical needs with comfort, mobility, and climate in mind.
about.approachSubtitle: Our process is rooted in clinical precision and personal care
about.promiseIntro: Whether it's managing chronic conditions or aiding post-surgical recovery, we are committed to:
about.presenceBody: Headquartered in Mumbai, with operations in New Delhi and now in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, Vista Care is evolving into a global compression care provider, serving patients, medical professionals, and wellness centers.

howToOrder.heroTitle: How to order Vista Care compression garments
howToOrder.heroBody: Choose your product, take the right measurements, fill the order form, and we will handle the rest — from fitting advice to delivery.
howToOrder.catalogSubtitle: Explore our full range of medical-grade compression garments.
howToOrder.howToChooseTitle: 2. How to choose the right product
howToOrder.howToChooseSubtitle: Three simple checkpoints to land on the garment that fits your medical need.
howToOrder.formsSubtitle: Select the form that matches your product category. Each form lists the required measurements and fit questions.
howToOrder.tutorialSubtitle: A short walkthrough of the full ordering process.
howToOrder.howToUseSubtitle: Proper donning and care to maximise comfort and therapeutic effect.

why.heroBody: VISTA CARE medical compression stockings are engineered to provide graduated compression to the affected limb so as to enable effective blood flow.
why.comfortBody: VISTA CARE medical compression stockings are designed with specially developed cotton fabric.
why.comparisonTitle: WHY VISTA CARE MEDICAL COMPRESSION STOCKINGS?

measurementPage.heroBody: Find the right fit with our size chart. Measure in the morning when swelling is minimal, and use a soft measuring tape held snug but not tight.
measurementPage.howToSubtitle: Key circumferences we need for the perfect fit.
measurementPage.chartNote: Chart is indicative. For custom-fit garments please contact our team.
